## Gate definitions

- **`impl_complete`** — Production code lands; no NotImplementedError; all CLI flags wired; all error paths covered.
- **`real_archive_empirical`** — Real-archive empirical measurement on Lane G v3 anchor (or equivalent baseline). Tagged [empirical:<artifact>].
- **`contest_cuda`** — Actual [contest-CUDA] score from Vast.ai 4090 / Modal A100 / equivalent. NOT [contest-CPU advisory]. NEVER MPS.
- **`strict_preflight`** — STRICT preflight check covering the lane's bug class (or warn-only with documented STRICT promotion path).
- **`three_clean_review`** — 3-clean-pass adversarial review per CLAUDE.md Recursive adversarial review protocol. Counter at 3/3 with rotating perspectives, no new bugs.
- **`memory_entry`** — Memory file documenting empirical result + dispatch metadata + cross-refs.
- **`deploy_runbook`** — Deploy script + heartbeat + watchdog + harvest path documented (e.g. scripts/remote_lane_<id>.sh).

Pareto-frontier (int7 dominated by int8 due to bit-aligned packing penalty). Predicted band [0.196, 0.207] vs PR106 baseline 0.20946. Producer + adapter + wrapper landed at 62e3a51c/82ca9456/5c31755e. APOGEE_INTN_BITS=8 env var picks bit-width. |
| `lane_apogee_int7` (Apogee int7 block-FP on PR106 (Pareto-DOMINATED by int8)) | **L2** | ✓ | ✓ | ✗ | ✓ | ✗ | ✓ | ✓ | FALSIFIED 2026-05-04 by tools/apogee_intN_pareto.py — int7 archive is 205,158 bytes (+18,919 vs int8 187,731 bytes) for the same VERY-LOW distortion class. The non-byte-aligned int7 packing requires shift/mask boilerplate per block whereas int8 fits cleanly. Reactivation: only if a future packer eliminates the bit-aligned overhead (e.g., 2x int7 -> 14-bit aligned; or context model on the bit-stream). |
| `lane_pr106_latent_sidecar` (PR106 + per-pair latent-correction sidecar (PR100 hnerv_lc_v2 pattern)) | **L1** | ✓ | ✗ | ✗ | ✗ | ✗ | ✓ | ✓ | PROPOSAL — pre-registered at L0 per CLAUDE.md. Per-pair (dim_idx, delta_q) sidecar adds ~1.2KB to PR106 archive; predicted -0.00218 score Δ via PR100-vs-PR105 empirical (same arch family, +1124b/-0.00218 = net win). Stacks orthogonally with apogee_intN bit-width reduction. Cost: ~$0.60 (Vast.ai 4090 brute-force search + contest-CUDA eval). Council gate REQUIRED before implementation per design-decisions-non-negotiable. Reactivation: council 5/8 GO + operator approves dispatch. Cross-ref: docs/pr100_latent_sidecar_porting_proposal_20260504.md |

Per-frame 3-byte (Y_offset, dy, dx) sidechannel; ~1-2KB brotli'd. Predicted -0.0005 to -0.0015 score Δ on PR106 base. STACKS orthogonally with lane_pr106_latent_sidecar (latent-space vs pixel-space corrections operate at different forward-pass stages). Stacked predicted ~-0.003 score Δ at ~3KB combined sidechannel cost. Cost: ~$0.60 (brute-force 49×255 dy/dx/Y candidates × 1200 frames on Vast.ai 4090). Council gate REQUIRED per design-decisions-non-negotiable. Implement only AFTER lane_pr106_latent_sidecar lands an empirical result. Cross-ref: docs/codex_metric_yshift_audit_20260504.md |
